title: Method Level 5E — Mastery
summary: L5 Mastery: velocity études, extended runs, and longer pieces across all Level 5 keys. All grand-staff, 8–16 measures, faster tempos 76–88bpm.

exercises.title: D Major Velocity Study
exercises.summary: Continuous eighth-note runs through D major at a brisk tempo.
exercises.goal: Play smooth, even eighth-note runs through D major with both hands in tune.

exercises.title: D Major Grand Étude
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure D major étude with mixed eighth-note and quarter-note phrases.
exercises.goal: Sustain D major fluency across twelve measures with expressive melodic shaping.

exercises.title: D Major Sonatina Finale
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure D major sonatina finale with energetic eighth-note passages.
exercises.goal: Deliver a compelling D major sonatina finale with confident runs and clear phrasing.

exercises.title: A Major Velocity Study
exercises.summary: Continuous eighth-note runs through A major reaching up to F#5.
exercises.goal: Play even A major eighth-note runs spanning a wide range with both hands.

exercises.title: A Major Grand Étude
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure A major étude with mixed rhythms and flowing melodic lines.
exercises.goal: Sustain A major fluency across twelve measures with expressive phrasing.

exercises.title: A Major Sonatina Finale
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure A major sonatina finale with brilliant eighth-note passages.
exercises.goal: Deliver an A major sonatina finale with confident, singing runs.

exercises.title: Bb Major Étude de Vitesse
exercises.summary: Continuous eighth-note runs through Bb major reaching G5.
exercises.goal: Play smooth Bb major eighth-note runs from Bb4 up to G5 and back.

exercises.title: Bb Major Mastery
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure Bb major mastery piece with flowing eighth-note passages.
exercises.goal: Play an extended Bb major piece with fluency, balancing both hands throughout.

exercises.title: Eb Major Velocity Study
exercises.summary: Continuous eighth-note runs through Eb major with all three flats.
exercises.goal: Play smooth Eb major eighth-note runs across the full scale range.

exercises.title: Eb Major Mastery
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure Eb major mastery piece with flowing eighth-note and quarter-note passages.
exercises.goal: Play an extended Eb major piece with fluency and musical shape.

exercises.title: Ab Major Étude
exercises.summary: Continuous eighth-note runs through Ab major with all four flats.
exercises.goal: Play smooth Ab major eighth-note runs across the full scale range.

exercises.title: Ab Major Grand Piece
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure Ab major piece with flowing melodic lines and active accompaniment.
exercises.goal: Sustain Ab major fluency with musical shaping across twelve measures.

exercises.title: F# Major Étude
exercises.summary: Continuous eighth-note runs through F# major with A# and D# throughout.
exercises.goal: Play F# major eighth-note runs fluently with all six sharps.

exercises.title: F# Major Mastery
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure F# major mastery piece with mixed rhythms and sustained phrasing.
exercises.goal: Sustain F# major over twelve measures with fluent passages and clean phrasing.

exercises.title: G Minor Velocity Study
exercises.summary: Continuous eighth-note runs through G harmonic minor with F# raised 7th.
exercises.goal: Play G harmonic minor eighth-note runs fluently, highlighting the F# leading tone.

exercises.title: G Minor Grande Étude
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure G harmonic minor étude with flowing lines and F# resolutions.
exercises.goal: Sustain G minor expression across twelve measures with the F# leading tone.

exercises.title: G Minor Mastery
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure G harmonic minor mastery piece with dramatic expression.
exercises.goal: Play a sweeping G minor piece with F# leading tone resolution and full range.

exercises.title: D Minor Velocity Study
exercises.summary: Continuous eighth-note runs through D harmonic minor with C# raised 7th.
exercises.goal: Play D harmonic minor eighth-note runs fluently with the C# leading tone.

exercises.title: D Minor Grande Étude
exercises.summary: Twelve-measure D harmonic minor étude with flowing eighth-note passages.
exercises.goal: Sustain D minor expression with C# resolutions across twelve measures.

exercises.title: Level 5 Grand Capstone
exercises.summary: Sixteen-measure capstone contrasting D harmonic minor and D major in a single grand piece.
exercises.goal: Play the L5 capstone fluently, navigating the shift from D minor to D major.
